first_dialog: Okay kid, I think I have an idea on how we can get a stick of RAM for your Swapdeck!
I realized that the RAM in the brains of the robots the store has are compatible with the Swapdeck - we just need to get our hands on a robot brain!

Well, the robot inside the store got their noodle completely fried and is mostly useless for our purposes. However, the store does have a backup robot that they were planning on using to automate mowing the store lawn.

So my thinking was that if we're able to crack open a clanker head, we should be able to get access to a couple of high end RAM sticks. I'm keeping the good stuff for myself of course, but you can just have what's necessary for the Swapdeck.
Good question, I already have a plan. The store will not be happy if we just break their property so we have to make this look like a catastrophic malfunction.
So I just deployed the robot outside to start mowing the lawn and you need to go talk to it and say that you want to assist.

Once you're done mowing the lawn, you need to shoot it with your water gun to disable it. I'll then tell management there was an "accident" and then I can take out the brain for "repairs". Then we can get our free RAM sticks!
Just one small issue: I believe the robot does have some self defense subroutines programmed in so you might want to be careful... that thing has some interesting defenses built in.
Anyway I've created a job posting for mowing the store's lawn so head out to the job board and afterwards go talk to the robot. Got it?
player_dialog: Wait really? What do I need to do?
And how exactly are we going to do that?
Alright, how are we going to get the brain though?
possible_dialog: Did you assassinate that clanker yet? No? Well then, quit wasting my time and go get that robot brain!
